n_open.title: Warm opening
n_open.description: Thanks for taking the time to chat today, Sarah — I’m excited to discuss how Slack can help your team.

n_disc.title: Discovery
n_disc.description: Can you share how your team communicates and collaborates using Microsoft Teams right now?

n_incumbent.title: Incumbent objection
n_incumbent.description: We already use Microsoft Teams — it's bundled with our license.

n_coexist.title: Reframe
n_coexist.description: Actually, Slack can run alongside Teams; it’s designed to complement your existing tools, not replace them.

n_curious.title: Curious buyer
n_curious.description: Okay, but where does Slack actually win over Teams?

n_pilot.title: Pilot offer
n_pilot.description: How about we set up a low-risk 2-week pilot with one of your teams to see how it goes?

n_yes.title: Pilot agreement
n_yes.description: Sure, let’s run the pilot and see how it works out.

n_unconvinced.title: Pushback
n_unconvinced.description: We just standardized on Teams — not now.

n_discover.title: Discovery-first
n_discover.description: What aspects of Teams do you find most challenging in your day-to-day operations?

n_pain.title: Admitting pain
n_pain.description: Honestly, the search functionality is weak and threads often get lost.

n_show.title: Show solution
n_show.description: Slack’s powerful search and organized threads can really address those pain points — would you like to see a demo?

n_demo.title: Demo booked
n_demo.description: Yes, let’s schedule a demo to explore this further.

n_knock.title: Disparaging Teams
n_knock.description: I think Teams is a bit clunky and outdated — it really struggles with user experience.

n_defensive.title: Defensive response
n_defensive.description: Just send me some info, please.

n_price.title: Cost inquiry
n_price.description: What does this run for 250 people?

n_value.title: Value anchoring
n_value.description: Let’s focus on the value — think about the time saved per seat rather than just the sticker price.

n_proof.title: Proof request
n_proof.description: Can you show me proof that it pays off at our size?

n_caseclose.title: Case study success
n_caseclose.description: That case study is really relevant — I’m ready to move forward.

n_pushprice.title: Price balking
n_pushprice.description: I’m still not sure about the price.

n_discount.title: Discount lead
n_discount.description: We can offer you a discount to make this more appealing.

n_anchor.title: Anchoring low
n_anchor.description: I was hoping for something even lower than that.
